title: Char-Grill-Yang Croatian Wagyu Grill
description: A crowd-pleasing dish featuring Wagyu beef, char-grilled to perfection and infused with a hint of tangy brininess.

ingredients.name: Wagyu beef ribeye
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality Wagyu beef with a marbling score of at least 6.

ingredients.name: Lemon
ingredients.notes: Use a fresh, organic lemon for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Parsley
ingredients.notes: Choose fresh, curly parsley for the best presentation.

instructions: Preheat a grill to medium-high heat, or 400°F (200°C).
Season the Wagyu beef with Croatian salt, black pepper, garlic, and a pinch of smoked paprika.
Drizzle the Wagyu beef with olive oil and let it sit at room temperature for 30 minutes before grilling.
Grill the Wagyu beef for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the Wagyu beef to a cutting board and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Meanwhile, mix together lemon juice, red wine vinegar, and a pinch of sea salt in a small bowl.
Brush the Wagyu beef with the lemon-vinegar mixture during the last minute of grilling.
Garnish the Wagyu beef with fresh parsley, a sprig of thyme, and a sprinkle of Ayurvedic tamasic-friendly herbs.
Serve the Wagyu beef immediately, sliced thinly and arranged artfully on a plate.
